item.title: Chante Bethell (2018 - 2019)
item.description: Chante is a former undergraduate research student who graduated in May 2019 with her BS in Bioinformatics from the department of Molecular and Cellular Biosciences at Rowan University. She is now a Biological Data Analyst at the Childhood Cancer Data Lab in Philadelphia, PA.

item.title: Francis K. Picone (2019 - 2020)
item.description: Frankie is a former undergraduate research student who graduated in May 2020 with his BS in Biological Sciences from the Department of Biological Sciences, with a minor in Chemistry. He is now a Laboratory Assistant at Salem Botanicals.

item.title: Jake Mihalecz (Fall 2020 - Present)
item.description: Jake is an undergraduate student majoring in Biological Sciences Rowan University. He is working on a research project to study biases in protein models evolutionary divergence estimation.

item.title: John ("Jake") Kovaleski (Fall 2020 - Present)
item.description: Jake is an undergraduate student majoring in Biological Sciences Rowan University, and he is a member of the Honors College. He is involved with a project to develop a flexible and modular R package to teach introductory data science skills to novices.

item.title: Judith Evans (Spring 2021 - Present)
item.description: Judith is an undergraduate student majoring in Biological Sciences Rowan University, with two minors in Spanish and Chemistry. She is involved with a project to develop a flexible and modular R package to teach introductory data science skills to novices.

item.title: Madeline ("Maddie") Greene (Fall 2020-Present)
item.description: Maddie is an undergraduate student majoring in Biological Sciences Rowan University, with two minors in Spanish and Sustainability Science, after which she will pursue her M.A. in STEM Education at Rowan University. She is involved with a project to develop a flexible and modular R package to teach introductory data science skills to novices.

item.title: Molly Miraglia (2019 - 2020)
item.description: Molly is a former undergraduate research student who graduated in December 2020 with her BS in Bioinformatics from the department of Molecular and Cellular Biosciences at Rowan University. While in the Spielman lab, she worked on a project assessing how multiple sequence alignment uncertainty affects phylogenetic relative model selection.

item.title: Naman Srivastava (2019)
item.description: Naman is an undergraduate student majoring in Biological Sciences Rowan University. He conducted a research project in collaboration with Dr. Moore in the Department of Environmental Sciences to study the environmental the deep-time geological dynamics of metals commonly used as protein co-factors and is co-advised by Dr. Eli Moore in Rowan’s in the School of Earth and Environment.

item.title: Rachael Wilson (Fall 2020 - Present)
item.description: Rachael is an undergraduate student majoring in Biological Sciences Rowan University with a minor in Psychology. She is working on a collaborative project with Dr. Andrea Hunt, the Directory of Music Therapy at Rowan University, to develop a classroom-oriented tool for students to analyze EEG data.
